product.name: Kinder Bueno Chocolate Wafer Bar - White

metaData.Key Information:
You’re out. You’re on the go and most importantly, you’re busy. Whether you’ve missed the bus, got caught in the pouring rain or your day is just going from bad to worse Snickers snack bars will sort you out.

Active lifestyle? Reach for Snickers to help keep you going, wherever you’re going. Whether you’re halfway up a mountain or at half-time during your weekly five-a-side match.

Don’t lose steam when the clock is running out. Share a fun size Snickers Bar before the game and leave hunger on the sidelines.

product.name: Toblerone Swiss Chocolate Bar - Milk Chocolate

offers.description: Buy 1 Toblerone Swiss Chocolate Bar - Milk Chocolate @ $2.80

metaData.Ingredients:
Sugar, Full Cream Milk Powder (Cow's Milk), Wheat Flour, Cocoa Butter, Cocoa Mass, Vegetable Fat & Oil (Palm Kernel, Palm, Illipe, Shea), Cocoa Powder, Soya Lecithin, Emulsifier (E476), Yeast Food, Sodium Bicarbonate, Salt, Calcium Carbonate, Yeast, Vanillin
• Contains stabilisers, emulsifier as permitted food conditioner
• Contains permitted flavouring (Vanillin)
• All additives are of plant or synthetic origin
metaData.Key Information:
• Delicious chocolate bar
• Made of 2 fingers of crispy wafer covered with smooth milk chocolate
• Made with sustainably sourced cocoa from the Nestle Cocoa Plan
• Multipack of 6 kit kat bars
• Ideal treat to enjoy during your break
metaData.Preparation:
1. Tear the Kit Kat wrapper along the tear strip
2. Break off the wafer fingers one at a time
3. Snap a wafer finger in half and enjoy!
